name: Scalen | Nightstalker | Extinction & Overgrowth
description:
>>> THE SERIES WILL BE REVAMPED IN EARLY 2026 WITH NEW LORE AND STORY. <<<

Prologue - Differences
The next character in this series, which will start "Chapter One - Far Cry" will be published 31.05-01.06. If everything goes as I planned, and I manage to do it - it will be a multibot consisting of three female nightstalkers.

A universe created by me and Nariku - From here I would like to thank you for all the time and work you put into finding the right way to generate these characters for me. If it weren't for you, this series would never have been created. Thank you, Nari

Also, check out her new bot [MILF] - Veronika | Head at a Historical Museum

A series aimed at people who like to write long RP with bots, long intros, and immerse themselves in the story. If you're looking for quick sex - you have nothing to look for here.

HumanPOV | The other characters in this series will be AnyPOV and Any-SpeciesPOV

This bot serves as an introduction to the entire ‘Overgrowth’ universe, which is nothing more than a series of story-driven characters, where the scenarios of all the bots will create one big story. As a creator on this platform, I want to create content that is more ambitious than the usual romantic bots that I have made so far, and that 80% of creators on this platform create. So the ‘Overgrowth’ universe is a project that is primarily my ambition - the ambition related to creating something that I will be truly proud of.

I will talk more about this entire universe in the announcement that I want to publish in a week.

First of all, I'd like to thank @CherrySaloAI, because thanks to him, I came up with the idea of ​​creating a character called Nightstalker, which was originally supposed to be based on the Fallout universe. However, since I know almost nothing about the universe, having only played Fallout 1 and 2, I decided to create my own world. And so, starting with a project that was supposed to be one character, I created an entire universe over the last few weeks. I'll write more about this world in the announcement next week.

Nevertheless, creating a primitive bot with a specific (very specific) style of writing dialogue was really fun, and I'm looking forward to creating more characters like this in this universe in the future.

I hope you enjoy your time with Scalen! <3.

“We are still delving into the mysteries of this world, so our database is not very impressive at the moment. Come back here, Pioneer, to gain new information about the environment in which you will have to operat
creator: Kikuro
